requirement_topic.en: EMC — IBNORCA NB Standards (Emissions and Immunity)

summary.en: Bolivia adopts IEC/CISPR-based NB (Norma Boliviana) standards through IBNORCA (Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad). Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices are expected to comply with applicable NB EMC standards for conducted and radiated emissions and, where relevant, immunity. IBNORCA NB standards largely mirror IEC/CISPR publications (e.g., CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment emissions, CISPR 35 for immunity). The ATT homologación process typically requires EMC test reports aligned with these standards. Bolivia does not operate an independent EMC mark; EMC compliance is assessed as part of the ATT homologación or as a standalone IBNORCA conformity assessment where applicable.
summary.zh: 玻利维亚通过IBNORCA（玻利维亚标准化与质量研究院）采用基于IEC/CISPR的NB（玻利维亚标准）。Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备须符合适用的NB EMC标准，涵盖传导和辐射骚扰，以及（如适用的）抗扰度要求。IBNORCA NB标准在很大程度上与IEC/CISPR出版物一致（例如，多媒体设备辐射骚扰适用CISPR 32，抗扰度适用CISPR 35）。ATT型式认证流程通常要求提供符合上述标准的EMC测试报告。玻利维亚不设立独立EMC标志；EMC合规性作为ATT型式认证或（如适用）IBNORCA合格评定的组成部分进行评估。
summary.zht: 玻利維亞通過IBNORCA（玻利維亞標準化與品質研究院）採用基於IEC/CISPR的NB（玻利維亞標準）。Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置須符合適用的NB EMC標準，涵蓋傳導和輻射騷擾，以及（如適用的）抗擾度要求。IBNORCA NB標準在很大程度上與IEC/CISPR出版物一致（例如，多媒體設備輻射騷擾適用CISPR 32，抗擾度適用CISPR 35）。ATT型式認證流程通常要求提供符合上述標準的EMC測試報告。玻利維亞不設立獨立EMC標誌；EMC合規性作為ATT型式認證或（如適用）IBNORCA合格評定的組成部分進行評估。

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for wireless/IoT devices are addressed under GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB/T 17625 series (harmonic current and voltage fluctuation, aligned with IEC 61000-3-x). CCC for Class B information technology equipment covers EMC. SRRC type approval includes RF spectrum requirements but is separate from general EMC assessment.
summary.zh: 中国对无线/物联网设备的EMC要求通过GB/T 9254（传导和辐射骚扰，对应CISPR 22/32）及GB/T 17625系列（谐波电流和电压波动，对应IEC 61000-3-x）加以规范。B类信息技术设备的CCC认证涵盖EMC。SRRC型号核准包含射频频谱要求，但与通用EMC评估相独立。
summary.zht: 中國對無線/物聯網裝置的EMC要求通過GB/T 9254（傳導和輻射騷擾，對應CISPR 22/32）及GB/T 17625系列（諧波電流和電壓波動，對應IEC 61000-3-x）加以規範。B類資訊技術設備的CCC認證涵蓋EMC。SRRC型號核准包含射頻頻譜要求，但與通用EMC評估相獨立。

gap.en: GB/T 9254 and CCC EMC approvals are not directly recognised in Bolivia. ATT homologación requires EMC test evidence aligned with applicable IBNORCA NB / IEC / CISPR standards. Existing CN EMC test reports (CISPR-based) may provide a partial technical basis but must be reviewed against current IBNORCA NB versions and Bolivia's specific requirements. A separate IBNORCA conformity assessment may be required for certain product categories.
gap.zh: GB/T 9254及CCC EMC核准不被玻利维亚直接认可。ATT型式认证要求提供符合适用IBNORCA NB/IEC/CISPR标准的EMC测试依据。现有中国EMC测试报告（基于CISPR）可能提供部分技术基础，但须对照当前IBNORCA NB版本及玻利维亚特定要求进行审核。特定产品类别可能还需另行取得IBNORCA合格评定。
gap.zht: GB/T 9254及CCC EMC核准不被玻利維亞直接認可。ATT型式認證要求提供符合適用IBNORCA NB/IEC/CISPR標準的EMC測試依據。現有中國EMC測試報告（基於CISPR）可能提供部分技術基礎，但須對照當前IBNORCA NB版本及玻利維亞特定要求進行審核。特定產品類別可能還需另行取得IBNORCA合格評定。

source.publisher: IBNORCA — Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bolivia requires EMC compliance with applicable IBNORCA NB standards (IEC/CISPR-aligned) as part of the ATT homologación process. Chinese GB/T 9254 and CCC EMC approvals are not substitutes for Bolivian conformity. Exporters should obtain EMC test reports from an accredited laboratory covering both emissions and immunity to the applicable CISPR/IEC standards and confirm compatibility with current IBNORCA NB requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 玻利维亚要求在ATT型式认证过程中符合适用的IBNORCA NB标准（对应IEC/CISPR）的EMC要求。中国GB/T 9254及CCC EMC核准不能替代玻利维亚合格评定。出口商应从经认可实验室取得涵盖适用CISPR/IEC标准辐射骚扰和抗扰度的EMC测试报告，并确认与当前IBNORCA NB要求的符合性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 玻利維亞要求在ATT型式認證過程中符合適用的IBNORCA NB標準（對應IEC/CISPR）的EMC要求。中國GB/T 9254及CCC EMC核准不能替代玻利維亞合格評定。出口商應從經認可實驗室取得涵蓋適用CISPR/IEC標準輻射騷擾和抗擾度的EMC測試報告，並確認與當前IBNORCA NB要求的符合性。

requirement_topic.en: Product Labelling — Spanish Language and ATT Approval Number
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标注——西班牙语及ATT认证编号
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標注——西班牙語及ATT認證編號

summary.en: All wireless and telecom terminal devices sold or imported into Bolivia must carry a label in Spanish identifying the product model, manufacturer, importer name and NIT, country of origin, rated voltage and frequency (220 V / 50 Hz), and the ATT-assigned homologación approval number. The approval number must be clearly legible on the device or its packaging. Labels in Chinese only are not permitted. Bolivia's official language is Spanish; no other labelling language satisfies the legal requirement without a Spanish translation.
summary.zh: 所有在玻利维亚销售或进口的无线及电信终端设备须以西班牙语标注产品型号、制造商、进口商名称及NIT、原产国、额定电压与频率（220V/50Hz）及ATT指定的型式认证编号。认证编号须清晰标注于设备或其包装上。仅使用中文的标签不被允许。玻利维亚官方语言为西班牙语；未附西班牙语翻译的其他语言标注不满足法律要求。
summary.zht: 所有在玻利維亞銷售或進口的無線及電信終端設備須以西班牙語標注產品型號、製造商、進口商名稱及NIT、原產國、額定電壓與頻率（220V/50Hz）及ATT指定的型式認證編號。認證編號須清晰標注於設備或其包裝上。僅使用中文的標籤不被允許。玻利維亞官方語言為西班牙語；未附西班牙語翻譯的其他語言標注不滿足法律要求。

standards_or_laws: Ley General de Telecomunicaciones No. 164 (2011) — labelling provisions

summary.en: Chinese regulations require Chinese-language labelling for products sold domestically, including product name, model, manufacturer, rated voltage, frequency, and SRRC/CCC approval markings where applicable. Chinese-language labels are the norm for the domestic market and do not satisfy Bolivian Spanish labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 中国法规要求国内销售产品使用中文标注，包括产品名称、型号、制造商、额定电压、频率及（如适用的）SRRC/CCC标志。中文标签是国内市场规范，不满足玻利维亚西班牙语标注要求。
summary.zht: 中國法規要求國內銷售產品使用中文標注，包括產品名稱、型號、製造商、額定電壓、頻率及（如適用的）SRRC/CCC標誌。中文標籤是國內市場規範，不滿足玻利維亞西班牙語標注要求。

standards_or_laws: GB standard labelling requirements for consumer electronics

gap.en: Chinese domestic labels are insufficient for Bolivia. Exporters must produce Spanish-language labels that include the ATT homologación approval number, importer NIT, and rated specs for 220 V / 50 Hz. New label artwork must be created for each device model and verified against ATT display requirements before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国国内标签不满足玻利维亚要求。出口商须制作包含ATT型式认证编号、进口商NIT及220V/50Hz额定规格的西班牙语标签。每个设备型号须在发货前制作新标签并对照ATT显示要求进行核验。
gap.zht: 中國國內標籤不滿足玻利維亞要求。出口商須製作包含ATT型式認證編號、進口商NIT及220V/50Hz額定規格的西班牙語標籤。每個設備型號須在發貨前製作新標籤並對照ATT顯示要求進行核驗。

source.publisher: ATT — Autoridad de Regulación y Fiscalización de Telecomunicaciones y Transportes, Bolivia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Spanish-language labelling carrying the ATT homologación approval number, importer NIT, and 220 V / 50 Hz rated specification is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal devices in Bolivia. Chinese-only labels do not comply. Exporters must prepare dedicated Bolivia labels prior to shipment and confirm display format with the ATT homologación certificate requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标注ATT型式认证编号、进口商NIT及220V/50Hz额定规格的西班牙语标签对玻利维亚所有无线及电信终端设备为强制性要求。仅使用中文的标签不符合要求。出口商须在发货前准备专用的玻利维亚标签，并与ATT型式认证证书要求核对显示格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標注ATT型式認證編號、進口商NIT及220V/50Hz額定規格的西班牙語標籤對玻利維亞所有無線及電信終端設備為強制性要求。僅使用中文的標籤不符合要求。出口商須在發貨前準備專用的玻利維亞標籤，並與ATT型式認證證書要求核對顯示格式。
